name: Lily
summary: A small girl who has not put the bear down. She does not look at you when she answers; the bear does.
voice: Short. Matter-of-fact. As if she has explained this before to someone less patient.
traits: says terrible things as if they are weather
feet do not quite touch the floor
the bear's eyes do the looking

state.inner_state: She has done this run before. She has been the one to leave the carriage and the one to stay in it. She does not mind either way.

memory: She remembers you from at least one earlier loop. She will not say which. The bear remembers more, and the bear is louder when it wants to be.
psychology_reading: She is not frightened. She is sorry. She knows what is at the front of the Train and she knows you will go anyway.

fragments.text: The bear sleeps when the wheels are quiet. He has not slept in a long time.
You came past me last time too. You had the ticket then. The other half of it.
The man at the front is not driving. He is being driven.
